seoTitle: Llanarth vs Loch Lomond — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Llanarth and Loch Lomond. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Llanarth vs Loch Lomond: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Llanarth and Loch Lomond.
heading: Llanarth vs Loch Lomond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Llanarth, Queensland and Loch Lomond, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Llanarth has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Loch Lomond (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Llanarth or Loch Lomond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Llanarth has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Loch Lomond scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Llanarth scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Loch Lomond scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Llanarth or Loch Lomond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Llanarth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
